# GEOoptimised

> Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) agency. We help brands get cited by AI search engines including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, and Gemini.

## What We Do

GEOoptimised provides Generative Engine Optimisation services. GEO is the practice of optimising digital content so that large language models (LLMs) and AI-powered search engines cite, reference, and recommend a brand in their generated responses.

We are distinct from traditional SEO agencies. While SEO optimises for blue-link rankings, GEO optimises for AI citations across multiple platforms simultaneously.

## Core Services

- GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation): Full-service AI visibility optimisation
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation): Optimisation for answer-based search interfaces
- AI Brand Visibility Audits: Assessment of current LLM citation presence
- Entity & Knowledge Graph Optimisation: Structured data and entity authority building
- Platform-Specific Optimisation: Tailored strategies for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews
- LLM Monitoring & Tracking: Ongoing measurement of AI citation performance

## Expertise

- Generative Engine Optimisation methodology and implementation
- Answer Engine Optimisation strategy and execution
- Schema markup and structured data for AI consumption
- llms.txt implementation and AI crawler management
- Cross-model optimisation across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude
- Entity authority building and Knowledge Graph optimisation

## Content Structure

- /generative-engine-optimisation/ - Complete GEO guide (pillar content)
- /geo-services/ - Service offerings and deliverables
- /answer-engine-optimisation/ - AEO methodology guide
- /geo-agency/ - Agency overview and approach
- /aeo-agency/ - Answer Engine Optimisation agency services
- /about/ - Company background and expertise
- /contact/ - Get in touch
